ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"implementation_plan","RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Aligning desktop headers, mobile menus, and footer 'Resort Menu' links across all resort pages to match index.html page names and links while preserving active states."}
CodeContent:
"# Implementation Plan - Navigation Menu Alignment

This plan details the alignment of the desktop header navigation menu, mobile sidebar menu, and footer "Resort Menu" widget across all 8 HTML pages of the resort site to match the names and links in `index.html`.

## User Review Required
> [!IMPORTANT]
> - All pages will list the same 8 main links in the desktop header and mobile sidebar (Home, About Resort, Accommodation, Premium Accommodation, Dining, Events, Gallery, Contact, with "Experience" added to the desktop header pointing to `dining.html`).
> - Old links like `yurts.html`, `deluxe-rooms.html`, `restaurant.html`, etc. (which do not exist in the codebase) will be replaced with clean, valid links to the existing pages.
> - The current active page will be highlighted with the `.active` class in the desktop header.

## Proposed Changes

### Source HTML Files

#### [MODIFY] [index.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/index.html)
#### [MODIFY] [about-us.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/about-us.html)
#### [MODIFY] [accomodations.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/accomodations.html)
#### [MODIFY] [premium-accomodations.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/premium-accomodations.html)
#### [MODIFY] [dining.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/dining.html)
#### [MODIFY] [events.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/events.html)
#### [MODIFY] [gallery.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/gallery.html)
#### [MODIFY] [contact-us.html](file:///Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source/contact-us.html)

- **Desktop Header Navigation**: Align `<ul class="navbar-nav">` to match `index.html` items and links, setting the `active` class on the active page's `li.menu-item`.
- **Mobile Sidebar Menu**: Align `<aside class="sigma_aside sigma_aside-left">` list to contain the 8 clean page links.
- **Footer Resort Menu**: Align the Resort Menu list items to Accommodation, Premium Accommodat
<truncated 714 bytes>
Description: "Create the implementation plan for aligning all navigation menus across the HTML pages."
